title: Modern Loft in Downtown
description: Spacious 2‑bedroom loft with city views, open floor plan, and rooftop access.

title: Cozy Suburban House
description: 3‑bedroom family home with garden, garage, and nearby schools.

description: 5‑bedroom penthouse with private pool, concierge, and panoramic skyline views.

title: Beachside Villa
description: 4‑bedroom villa with private beach access, infinity pool, and stunning ocean views.

title: Mountain Cabin Retreat
description: Cozy cabin nestled in the mountains, perfect for weekend getaways and nature lovers.

title: Urban Studio Apartment
description: Compact studio in the heart of the city, close to transit, shops, and nightlife.

title: Mediterranean Mansion
description: Exquisite 6-bedroom estate with Spanish architecture, luxury marble floors, and lush palm gardens.

title: Historic Victorian Home
description: Beautifully restored Victorian era home featuring original stained glass and elegant woodworking.

title: Glass Lakehouse

title: Charming Country Farmhouse
